zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth MacDuff於1195年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾時，她的父親David Macduff14歲，母親Matilda de Strathearn11歲。她於1215年與William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1250年在蘇格蘭享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth MacDuff于1195年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾时，她的父亲David Macduff14岁，母亲Matilda de Strathearn11岁。她于1215年与William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray在英国苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1250年在苏格兰享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth MacDuff was born in 1195, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, David Macduff, was 14 and her mother, Matilda de Strathearn, was 11. She married William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray in 1215, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1250, in Scotland, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth MacDuff est née en 1195, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, David Macduff, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Strathearn, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray en 1215, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1250, à Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth MacDuff 1195 in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Macduff 14 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Strathearn 11. Sie hat 1215 in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1250 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth MacDuff è nata il nel 1195 nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, David Macduff, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Strathearn, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray nel 1215, nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1250, nel Scotland, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth MacDuffが1195年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルで生まれた時，父David Macduffは14歳，母Matilda de Strathearnは11歳であった。1215年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルでWilliam de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1250年にスコットランドで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth MacDuff(이)가 1195년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Macduff(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Strathearn(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1215년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에서 William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 스컷랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth MacDuff nasceu em 1195, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, David Macduff, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Strathearn, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray em 1215, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1250, em Scotland, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth MacDuff родилась в 1195 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени David Macduff было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Strathearn, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray в 1215 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1250 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth MacDuff nació en 1195, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, David Macduff, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Matilda de Strathearn, tenía 11 años. Se casó con William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray en 1215, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1250, en Scotland, a la edad de 56 años.
